name: Lemon-Olive Meatball Appetizers
recipeInstructions:
Partially cook the bacon, ensuring it does not curl.
Mix all ingredients except the bacon. Shape into 12 balls. Wrap each ball with a slice of bacon; secure with a toothpick. Arrange in a baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 40 minutes, turning occasionally.
Makes 12 meatballs, suitable for appetizers or as the main course.
